hero.title: The art of transforming your belongings.

tagline.text: Let's make the most of our resources for a more

recycle.label: RECYCLE
recycle.description: Give a new purpose to your end-of-life materials thanks to our optimized collection and sorting network.

repair.label: REPAIR
repair.description: Extend the life of your belongings with the expertise of our craftspeople specialized in restoration.

transform.label: TRANSFORM
transform.description: Turn your old products into unique, design pieces.

learn.label: LEARN
learn.description: Learn tomorrow's skills with our {count} available workshops and grow your expertise.

arguments.title: Transform what exists, preserve the
arguments.subtitle: UpCycleConnect supports every step of your eco-responsible journey, from idea to realization, in every region.

item1.title: Local collection
item1.text: Drop off your items at a partner container near you.

item2.title: Matchmaking
item2.text: We connect your materials with qualified craftspeople and creators.

item3.title: Impact tracking
item3.text: Measure concretely the waste you've avoided with your Upcycling Score.

why.title: Why join
why.subtitle: Because every object deserves a second chance. We've built an ecosystem where creativity meets sustainability to transform how we consume and act together.

testimonial.quote: "I was looking for a unique way to decorate my café without buying new. Thanks to UpcycleConnect, I found the inspiration and craftspeople to turn simple cups into a light installation that fascinates my customers every day!!"

listings.pageTitle: For sale or to give away.

formationsPage.subtitle: Discover the trainings offered by our trainers and join the one that inspires you.
formationsPage.empty: No training available at the moment.

conseils.subtitle: Practical guides, tutorials and ideas to succeed at your upcycling projects.

tarifs.subtitle: Choose the plan that fits your needs. No commitment, cancel anytime.
tarifs.noResults: No subscription available at the moment.

recycle.description: This service includes an audit of your materials, dedicated collection bins, and transport to our partner sorting centers where each material is processed to re-enter a production cycle.

repair.description: A tailored restoration service. We diagnose the cause of the fault or wear on your item and hand it to a qualified expert. The service includes sourcing second-hand spare parts and a warranty on the repair performed.

transform.description: Creative support for your design projects. From the initial sketch to final production, our craftspeople use upcycling techniques to create unique furniture or accessories from your old belongings.

forum.subtitle: Exchange, share and learn with the UpCycleConnect community.

forumCreate.heading: Create a new thread
forumCreate.titlePlaceholder: What would you like to discuss?

hero.title: Our mission.
hero.subtitle: UpCycleConnect was born from a simple belief: the things we own deserve better than the trash. We build bridges between those who have and those who know how to make.

values.title: What we
values.subtitle: Four principles guide every decision we make, every feature we build.

item1.title: Circular economy
item1.text: We believe in a model where resources are never wasted. Every object gets a second, a third life.

item2.title: Craftsmanship
item2.text: We value manual work and local skills. Our craftspeople are at the heart of every project we support.

item3.title: Community & sharing
item3.text: The platform thrives thanks to its members. Sharing a technique, giving away an item, finding a repairer — it all starts here.

item4.title: Measurable impact
item4.text: Every action on the platform helps reduce waste. We make that impact visible and concrete for everyone.

story.title: Our story.
story.text1: UpCycleConnect was born in 2023 from the meeting of designers, craftspeople and engineers who shared the same frustration: it was too complicated to give a second life to your belongings.
story.text2: Since then, we've built a platform that simplifies every step — finding a repairer, posting a listing, joining a workshop, or simply getting inspired by what the community creates every day.

mentions.title: Legal notice
mentions.editor: UpCycleConnect — 174 rue La Fayette, 75010 Paris, France.
mentions.host: This site is hosted by a GDPR-compliant cloud provider.
mentions.contact: For any question, contact us at contact@upcycleconnect.fr.

terms.title: Terms of use
terms.intro: Using the UpCycleConnect platform implies full acceptance of these terms of use.
terms.usage: Each user agrees to provide accurate information and to respect the community as well as the items circulated through the platform.
terms.liability: UpCycleConnect connects users but cannot be held liable for the quality of exchanged items or transactions between individuals and professionals.

privacy.title: Privacy policy
privacy.data: The personal data collected (identity, contact details, activity history) is used solely for the operation of the service and is never resold to third parties.
privacy.rights: In accordance with GDPR, you have the right to access, rectify and delete your data at any time from your profile.
privacy.contact: To exercise your rights, contact our data protection officer at privacy@upcycleconnect.fr.
